column1: Early Life (Phase 1) – Born into wealth, inspired by Mañjuśrī.
Initial Training (Phase 2-10) – Learns foundational Dharma from ascetics and monastics.
Diverse Teachers (Phase 11-30) – Studies under kings, prostitutes, and deities.
Visionary Experiences (Phase 31-50) – Enters Maitreya’s cosmic tower.
Final Realization (Phase 51-53) – Samantabhadra reveals ultimate truth.
(Full details available upon request—here’s a condensed version.)
English Translation: Cleary, T. (1993). The Flower Ornament Scripture (Vol. 3). Shambhala.
Sanskrit Fragments: Vaidya, P.L. (1960). Gaṇḍavyūha Sūtra.
